step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{A} Yes — Multiple CAR-T therapies targeting CD19 have been explicitly approved by the FDA for various B-cell malignancies, including pediatric and adult B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (B-ALL), diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL), and follicular lymphoma. Additionally, newer approvals for other B-cell malignancies like mantle cell lymphoma and multiple myeloma further confirm widespread adoption in B-cell disorders.
raw_response:
\boxed{A} Yes — Multiple CAR-T therapies targeting CD19 have been explicitly approved by the FDA for various B-cell malignancies, including pediatric and adult B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (B-ALL), diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL), and follicular lymphoma. Additionally, newer approvals for other B-cell malignancies like mantle cell lymphoma and multiple myeloma further confirm widespread adoption in B-cell disorders.
\boxed{A}
